title: Sonoma Folding Farm Table Bench - 8' x 12'' - Fruitwood with Black Grain
features: Designed as the dedicated seating companion to the Sonoma Folding Farm Table, this 8-foot farm table bench seats 4 to 5 guests per side and folds flat for fast setup, breakdown, and compact storage.

Purpose-built to match the Sonoma Farm Table in finish and proportion. Available in Rustic and Fruitwood with Black Grain to mirror the farm table colorways exactly, eliminating the mismatched look that comes from pairing benches and tables sourced separately.

Seats 4 to 5 guests per side across an 8-foot run. Two benches cover one Sonoma farm table for a full bench configuration of 8 to 10 guests, or mix with the Sonoma Cross Back Chair for a more varied seating arrangement without disrupting the aesthetic.

Folds flat for fast setup and compact storage. No tools, no assembly, no complexity — the bench unfolds and is ready to use in seconds, and folds flat for efficient storage in a warehouse or trailer between events.

At 34 lbs., one person can move and set it efficiently. Light enough for a single crew member to handle across a full event setup, which matters when you're deploying multiple tables and benches against a tight load-in window.

Coordinates with cross back chairs for flexible seating arrangements. Pairs directly with the Sonoma Cross Back Chair for mixed bench-and-chair configurations at the same table, giving rental operators and venues flexibility to accommodate different guest preferences at the same setup.

faq.question: How many people does this bench seat?
faq.answer: At 96" long and 12" wide, the bench comfortably seats 4 to 5 guests per side. Two benches per table covers a full 8-foot farm table setup for 8 to 10 guests.

faq.question: Does the bench fold for storage and transport?
faq.answer: Yes. The bench folds flat, reducing its footprint significantly for warehouse storage and trailer loading. No tools or assembly required — unfold and it's ready to use.

faq.question: Can this bench be used outdoors?
faq.answer: Yes, for events on level outdoor surfaces. As with any wood-finish event furniture, storing the bench indoors between events and avoiding prolonged moisture exposure will extend its lifespan and preserve the finish over a rental or venue season.
